Ningbo Fortming Technology Co., Ltd. is a specialized lighting manufacturer with a history dating back to 2002. Formerly known as 'Beijing Fortming Lamp Co., Ltd.', the company strategically relocated its headquarters from Beijing to Yuyao, Ningbo, a major cluster for lighting and mold manufacturing in China. With a fully paid-in capital of 20 million RMB, it demonstrates strong financial stability. The company has evolved from pure manufacturing to offering comprehensive urban lighting solutions, including landscape engineering, industrial control systems, and contracting services.
